reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
너무신났어요 !!!!
요즘 장난감에 싫증을 잘 느껴가지고 사봤는데
반응 넘 좋네용ㅎㅎ
이불 속에서 놀아줘도 진짜 좋아해요,, 짱~
2개라서 여유있고 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: So excited!!!! 😆 My pet had been getting bored with toys lately, so I bought this and the reaction is amazing lol The pet loves playing with it even under the blankets,, it's the best~ Having 2 of them is nice and gives me peace of mind 😊

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content_en: It's pretty durable but my pet just seems curious about it and doesn't actually find it fun 😢

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: The durability is really bad… it broke within 10 minutes of arriving

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content_en: I bought this as a gift 😊 They loved it so much!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
역시 신나서 잘 놀아요.
완전 만족
reviews.content_en: As expected, my pet has a blast playing with it. Totally satisfied

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 환장 대환장쇼~ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 짧아서 생동감있게 놀아주기 좋네용
reviews.content_en: Absolute madness~ lol lol The short length makes it great for active play 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 전 낚시대를 재밌게 흔들어주지 못해서(낚시대는 남편이 고양이에게 잘해줌 ㅋㅋ) 스틱장난감을 자기전에 신나게 해줘서 구매합니다
reviews.content_en: I'm not great at playing with fishing rod toys (my husband is much better with the cat lol), so I buy stick toys to get my cat all excited before bedtime

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 집에 장난감이 많아 아직 아끼는 중이라 포장을 뜯지는 않았는데 겉으로 봤을때 조아할 것 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I have so many toys at home that I'm still saving this one, so I haven't opened the packaging yet, but from what I can see it looks like the pet will love it 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: My pet keeps breaking toys, so I had to buy a new one
